title: rootless podman failing due to SELinux denial
body:
/kind bug

On Fedora Silverblue 29 (29.20190129.0) my rootless `podman run` is silently failing due to an SELinux denial.

The following packages are installed:

```
container-selinux-2.80-1.git1b655d9.fc29.noarch
fuse-overlayfs-0.3-1.dev.git6d269aa.fc29.x86_64
podman-1.0.0-1.git82e8011.fc29.x86_64
```

Trying `podman run`:

```
$ whoami
miabbott
$ podman run --rm -it registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:29
$ echo $?
139
```

With debug output:

```
$ podman --log-level debug run --rm -it registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:29
```

comments.body:
cat  >/tmp/t
Jan 30 11:55:11 mastershake audit[21726]: AVC avc:  denied  { map } for  pid=21726 comm="bash" path="/usr/bin/bash" dev="fuse" ino=270626563 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c214,c389 tcontext=system_u:object_r:fusefs_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=0
[dwalsh@localhost libpod]$ audit2allow  -i /tmp/t


#============= container_t ==============

#!!!! This avc is allowed in the current policy
allow container_t fusefs_t:file map;
[dwalsh@localhost libpod]$ rpm -q container-selinux
container-selinux-2.77-1.git2c57a17.fc29.noarch

This has been allowed since at least container-selinux-2.77-1.

I think there has been a policy install issue.

@rhatdan You might be right.  I saw some another SELinux denial in my journal that looks like a bad policy.

Let's keep this open for now while I sort out any policy issues.

@rhatdan I'm not seeing the same on my system:

```
$ cat journal 
Jan 30 11:55:11 mastershake audit[21726]: AVC avc:  denied  { map } for  pid=21726 comm="bash" path="/usr/bin/bash" dev="fuse" ino=270626563 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c214,c389 tcontext=system_u:object_r:fusefs_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=0
$ audit2allow -i journal 


#============= container_t ==============

#!!!! This avc can be allowed using one of the these booleans:
#     domain_can_mmap_files, virt_sandbox_use_fusefs
allow container_t fusefs_t:file map;
```

I've got `container-selinux-2.80-1.git1b655d9.fc29.noarch` installed on my host.

I've done `semodule -B` to recompile the policy, but still seeing the same denial

Can you turn on the boolean.

setsebool -P virt_sandbox_use_fusefs 1
I see this allowed now on my system.  This was added on 2.75

That did the trick for me.  I suspect there is something wrong with the SELinux config on my host, so I'll close this.

```
$ sudo semanage boolean -l | grep virt_sandbox_use_fusefs                                                                                                                                      
virt_sandbox_use_fusefs        (off  ,  off)  Allow virt to sandbox use fusefs                                                          
$ sudo setsebool -P virt_sandbox_use_fusefs 1                                                                                                                                             
$ sudo semanage boolean -l | grep virt_sandbox_use_fusefs
virt_sandbox_use_fusefs        (on   ,   on)  Allow virt to sandbox use fusefs
$ podman run --rm -it docker.io/alpine cat /etc/os-release
NAME="Alpine Linux"
ID=alpine
VERSION_ID=3.9.0
PRETTY_NAME="Alpine Linux v3.9"
HOME_URL="https://alpinelinux.org/"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.alpinelinux.org/"
```

I have the same issue with Fedora Silverblue 29. The problem started after I formatted the volume with xfs - with btrfs I did not have this issue.

When I do

```
setsebool -P virt_sandbox_use_fusefs on
```
the issue is fixed. But after a reboot this change is gone. 

How can I fix this permanently (without any local oneshot systemd hack)?

Well the hacky way to do this would be to add a service that starts at boot time and does a
```
# setsebool virt_sandbox_use_fusefs on
```
No need for the -P, since silverblue is dropping the change on reboot anyways.
container-selinux-2.89-1.git2521d0d.fc29 should have a fix for this though.

This is installed on my system:

container-selinux-2.94-1.git1e99f1d.fc29.noarch

type=AVC msg=audit(1555425280.457:308): avc:  denied  { map } for  pid=7462 comm="run.sh" path="/usr/bin/bash" dev="fuse" ino=26566333 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c442,c952 tcontext=system_u:object_r:fusefs_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=0
type=ANOM_ABEND msg=audit(1555425280.457:309): auid=1000 uid=1000 gid=1000 ses=3 subj=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c442,c952 pid=7462 comm="run.sh" exe="/usr/bin/bash" sig=11 res=1AUID="fansari" UID="fansari" GID="fansari"
